name: fixtureCount
invariants: output.ok === false || output.result.message !== undefined || typeof output.result.meterSize === 'string'
output.ok === false || output.result.message !== undefined || typeof output.result.supplyLine === 'string'
output.ok === false || output.result.message !== undefined || typeof output.result.note === 'string'
_note: Pure compute, reads artifact.data.fixtures[]{type,count}. WSFU per IPC/UPC: toilet 2.5, lavatory 1, bathtub 2, shower 2, kitchen-sink 1.5, dishwasher 1.5, washing-machine 2, hose-bib 2.5 (unknown → 1.5). Meter band: ≤15→3/4", ≤30→1", ≤60→1.5", else 2". Empty/non-array/missing fixtures → { message } prompt (the empty-state card). Non-object fixture entries are skipped; non-finite counts fall to 1 via Number.isFinite — a non-array payload no longer crashes on .reduce (2026-06-28). PlumbCalc.tsx FixtureSupplyCalc renders fixtures/totalWSFU/meterSize/supplyLine/note EXACTLY (sends { type, count:number }) — fields verified aligned, no phantoms.
